use.flag: Use systemd for service management and initialization
Enable testing dependencies and test runners
Install Home Assistant CLI (hass-cli) for command-line interaction
Python debugger for Home Assistant development
Enable the Assist voice assistant pipeline for speech processing
Support for Assist satellite devices that extend voice assistant capabilities
Wyoming voice satellite protocol for voice pipelines
Integrate with Google Assistant SDK for voice control
Add a conversation agent powered by Google Gemini AI
Add a conversation agent powered by OpenAI GPT models
Add a conversation agent powered by Anthropic Claude AI
Add a conversation agent powered by local Ollama AI server
Access AI models via OpenRouter API
Model Context Protocol client for AI tool use
Model Context Protocol server for AI tool use
Support HomeKit integration for Apple device compatibility
Connect accessories with "Works with HomeKit" certification
Control Matter smart home devices on WiFi or Thread networks
Support Thread networking protocol for smart home devices
Enable Open Thread Border Router functionality
Support for ZHA (Zigbee Home Automation) compatible devices
Add deCONZ support for ConBee/RaspBee Zigbee gateways
Control Z-Wave networks via the Z-Wave JS driver
Control Z-Wave networks via Z-Wave.Me Z-Way server

Communicate with Lutron home automation systems
Support Lutron Caseta Smart Bridge PRO devices
Support INSTEON smart home devices and protocols
Integrate ISY994 controllers for Insteon and X10 devices
Support eQ-3 HomeMatic devices via XML-RPC API

Control RF devices via RFLink gateway
